title: Temple of the Creator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Temple of the Creator''' was the temple that was built to [[Yun-Yuuzhan]], the Creator God of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], after the [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongforming]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] into [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]].

When the Yuuzhan Vong dedicated the temple shortly after [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra's]] arrival, they planned to sacrifice hundreds of captives that had been captured during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], including Senators, their families, and high ranking members of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. However, [[Maw luur]]s began regurgitating the waste they had been consuming, causing sewage to leak onto the ground where the thousands of Yuuzhan Vong had been gathered. After a few attempts by the high priest to regain control of the sermon, Shimrra declared the sacrifice was spoiled.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
